heroIntro: Commissions, suggestions, ideas — I reply within 2 working days.

faq.question: How long does a commission take?
faq.answer: Depending on size and complexity, 4–8 weeks from sketch approval. In-stock pieces ship immediately.

faq.question: Do you ship internationally?
faq.answer: Yes — worldwide, insured via DHL. Shipping costs depend on size and destination: they're shown on Etsy when you buy there, and for commissions I include them in the quote.

faq.question: Which types of wood do you use?
faq.answer: Mainly birch, oak and lime from regional forestry. Other woods on request.

faq.question: How do I care for a piece?
faq.answer: Keep it dry and out of direct sunlight. If needed, re-oil once a year with natural oil — a small bottle comes with every piece.
